abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated promising generalization capabilities across robotic manipulation tasks, yet their real-world deployment remains limited by the lack of effective safety measures. Specifically, existing safety measures only prevent collisions caused by the robot's next action. In this paper, we propose a neuro-symbolic safety guidance mechanism for flow matching based VLAs that enables predictive collision avoidance. Flow matching based VLAs determine the next actions by predicting a trajectory (a sequence of actions) through an iterative neural flow matching process. Our method formulates safety enforcement as a minimum-norm constrained optimization problem that corrects safety violations during the denoising process of noisy intermediate trajectory predictions. By analyzing predicted trajectories and applying corrections during iterative denoising, our approach anticipates collisions before they become unavoidable. This interleaving of symbolic constraint satisfaction with neural trajectory generation enables predictive collision avoidance rather than reactive intervention. On the SafeLIBERO benchmark, our method achieves 82.8% collision avoidance and 81.6% task success, a 6.3% and 19.8% improvement respectively over single-step methods, with the largest gains on long-horizon tasks where compounding distribution shift is most pronounced. Video demonstrations of our approach are included on our project page at https://willenglish.tech/SafetyGuidedFlowMatching/.
selectionReason: 在 flow-matching VLA denoising 中解最小范数约束优化，把 CBF 从单步反应扩展到预测动作轨迹。 第4节给出轨迹碰撞建模与CBF注入；第5节 SafeLIBERO 得到82.8%避碰、81.6%任务成功，比单步方法+6.3/+19.8点，并分析长程/困难案例；第6节总结。 当前看板缺少VLA安全；相对 ReSteer 的可控性，本工作直接约束生成轨迹的预测碰撞。

title: DynaWM: A Base-VLA-Guided World Foundation Model for Moving-Object Manipulation
oneLiner: 不重训基础VLA，而把其action chunk作为条件，用多视图短历史和flow-DiT重生成移动物体拦截轨迹。
researchQuestion: 不重训基础VLA，而把其action chunk作为条件，用多视图短历史和flow-DiT重生成移动物体拦截轨迹。
contribution: 不重训基础VLA，而把其action chunk作为条件，用多视图短历史和flow-DiT重生成移动物体拦截轨迹。 第3节给出Mamba-3 action encoder、V-JEPA视觉和conditional flow；第4节构建DynaGrasp-32/1600，覆盖4种VLA，并做视觉/动作条件消融：去action condition下降45.44%。 相对EgoWAM/ABot，本工作专门把base-VLA action作为动态拦截world model的条件。 与现有看板工作的关系：相对EgoWAM/ABot，本工作专门把base-VLA action作为动态拦截world model的条件。
abstract: Although vision-language-action (VLA) models have received widespread attention, many challenges remain in manipulating dynamic moving objects. In most existing approaches, end-to-end forward or inverse dynamics models, i.e., world models, are incorporated into high-performance base VLA architectures, which may degrade the performance of well-pretrained base VLA models due to inappropriate fine-tuning. In this paper, we propose DynaWM, a base-VLA-guided world foundation model that adapts to a wide variety of fine-tuned and coarse-tuned base-VLA checkpoints for moving-object manipulation. DynaWM uses a Mamba-3-based action encoder to encode the base action chunk produced by the base VLA into an action-conditioning representation, a V-JEPA 2.1 vision encoder to extract features from multi-view observation history, and a proprioceptive state encoder to encode robotic-arm proprioceptive states. These feature representations jointly condition a flow-matching DiT to regenerate motion-aware action trajectories for moving-object manipulation. For systematic evaluation, we construct the DynaGrasp-32 benchmark, covering six categories of moving-object manipulation tasks, including velocity variation, trajectory variation, and multi-object manipulation, as well as the DynaGrasp-1600 dataset, which consists of 32 scenarios, 1,600 demonstration trajectories, and approximately 1.53M images. For fine-tuned base-VLA checkpoints, DynaWM achieves percentage improvements of 7.19, 45.31, 1.88, and 10.94 over SmolVLA, X-VLA, π0, and π0.5, respectively. For coarse-tuned base-VLA checkpoints, performance increases by 35.13, 44.06, 35.69, and 26.13 percentage, respectively. Ablation experiments show that visual encoding enhances success by 27.50%, while reducing success by 45.44% if action conditioning is removed.
selectionReason: 不重训基础VLA，而把其action chunk作为条件，用多视图短历史和flow-DiT重生成移动物体拦截轨迹。 第3节给出Mamba-3 action encoder、V-JEPA视觉和conditional flow；第4节构建DynaGrasp-32/1600，覆盖4种VLA，并做视觉/动作条件消融：去action condition下降45.44%。 相对EgoWAM/ABot，本工作专门把base-VLA action作为动态拦截world model的条件。

title: Human2Any: Human-to-Robot Transfer via Constraint-Aware Compositional Planning
titleZh: Human2Any：基于约束感知组合规划的人机技能迁移
oneLiner: 从人类视频中学习物体交互先验，通过约束感知的组合规划和扩散模型采样，实现跨不同机器人形态的零样本操作策略迁移。
researchQuestion: 机器人操作策略的学习高度依赖高质量的机器人遥操作演示数据，采集成本高且难以规模化。人类视频虽然丰富多样，但将其直接迁移到机器人面临三大障碍：(1) 人类与机器人之间的形态差异（embodiment mismatch）；(2) 场景变化（物体几何、布局不同）；(3) 机器人特有的可行性约束（可达性、关节限制、碰撞）。现有方法要么依赖机器人演示数据，要么直接将人类动作映射为机器人动作，难以在测试时灵活适应新场景和非同构机器人形态。
contribution: Human2Any 的核心洞察是：人类视频中可迁移的信号不是人体动作本身，而是物体之间的交互结构。通过将交互运动与机器人执行解耦，该工作为大规模利用非机器人视频数据训练操作策略开辟了道路。其约束感知组合采样的思路在扩散模型时代的 TAMP（任务与运动规划）中也具有参考价值。在 Franka 和人形机器人 RBY-1 上的跨形态验证尤其展示了该方法向多样化硬件泛化的潜力。
abstract: Human videos are a scalable source of supervision for robot manipulation, as they are abundant and naturally capture rich object interactions. However, transferring human demonstrations to robots remains challenging due to embodiment mismatch, scene variation, and robot-specific feasibility constraints. We present Human2Any, a framework for learning reusable object-centric interaction priors from human videos without requiring real-world robot demonstrations in the target task contexts. Human2Any represents manipulation through object-object interaction motion, capturing task-relevant scene changes while abstracting away embodiment-specific details. It composes learned interaction priors with robot-side feasibility reasoning and motion planning, allowing the same human-derived knowledge to adapt to different embodiments, scene geometries, and task contexts. We validate Human2Any across diverse manipulation settings, including real-world experiments on a Franka tabletop setup and an RBY-1 humanoid mobile robot, demonstrating robust interaction-centric manipulation without real-world robot training data.
selectionReason: 提出了一种从人类视频中学习物体交互先验并通过约束感知组合规划跨不同机器人形态部署的方法，在 Franka 和人形机器人 RBY-1 上实现了零样本迁移，不需要目标场景的机器人演示数据。

title: SimFoundry: Modular and Automated Scene Generation for Policy Learning and Evaluation
titleZh: SimFoundry：面向策略学习与评估的模块化自动化场景生成系统
oneLiner: 从单段视频零样本重建可交互仿真场景，并通过自动生成物体、场景和任务的数字表亲，实现仿真策略评估与真实世界策略训练的闭环。
researchQuestion: 在真实世界中训练和评估机器人策略成本高昂且难以规模化。现有的 real-to-sim 系统要么侧重于场景重建，要么侧重于策略评估，很少有统一系统能同时完成从视频到仿真场景的自动化重建、在仿真中评估策略，并利用生成的仿真数据训练可迁移到真实世界的策略。此外，现有工作在任务复杂度（多为简单抓取放置）和场景多样性（单一数字孪生）方面存在局限。
contribution: SimFoundry 展示了 real-to-sim 技术从"重建一个场景"到"系统性生成仿真数据并驱动真实世界策略改进"的范式转换。其模块化设计允许随着基础模型进步而替换组件，三重数字表亲（物体、场景、任务）的概念为仿真数据的可控多样性提供了清晰的框架。该系统还证明了仿真评估可以有效替代真实世界基准测试，对于降低机器人策略开发成本具有重要意义。
abstract: Training and evaluating robot policies in the real world is costly and difficult to scale. We introduce SimFoundry, a modular and automated system for zero-shot real-to-sim scene construction from a video. SimFoundry generates sim-ready digital twins and supports object, scene, and task editing, enabling the automated generation of diverse digital cousins: affordance-preserving variations of reconstructed real-world scenes. Policies trained on SimFoundry data transfer zero-shot to challenging real tasks involving multi-step manipulation, articulated object interaction, and bimanual interaction, and its digital cousins (variations of the original scene, objects, and tasks) facilitate generalization to new real-world conditions. Across 7 manipulation tasks and 5 policy architectures, SimFoundry simulation evaluations strongly predict real-world performance, with mean Pearson correlation 0.911 and mean maximum ranking violation 0.018. When evaluating sim-trained policies zero-shot in the real world, policies trained with object, scene, and task cousins in simulation show average task success rate improvements of 17%, 21%, and 40%, respectively. Additional details at https://research.nvidia.com/labs/gear/simfoundry/.
organizations: The University of Texas at Austin
selectionReason: SimFoundry是NVIDIA GEAR实验室推出的全自动化real-to-sim场景构建与策略训练评估系统。其核心创新在于数字孪生(digital twin)与数字表亲(digital cousins)的统一框架：从单段视频自动重建sim-ready交互式场景，并通过对象、场景、任务三个维度的affordance-preserving变体生成无限训练数据。实验覆盖7个操作任务和5种策略架构(π0、π0.5、GR00T N1.6/N1.7、DreamZero)，跨DROID和YAM两种机器人平台，sim-to-real评估Pearson相关系数高达0.911，MMRV仅0.018。数字表亲分别带来17%(object)、21%(scene)、40%(task)的零样本成功率提升。该工作展示了仿真如何在大规模策略训练和可靠评估中替代昂贵且不可扩展的真实世界数据采集，是具身智能基础设施方向的重要进展。

title: Learning Dexterous Manipulation Using Contact Wrench Guidance From Human Demonstration
titleZh: 利用人类演示中的接触力旋量引导学习灵巧操作
oneLiner: 通过物体中心的接触力旋量空间引导，将人类演示的接触模式转移到机器人强化学习策略中，实现大规模、长程、双手灵巧操作。
researchQuestion: 灵巧机器人操作可以从丰富的人类演示数据中获益，但由于人类与机器人在形态学、运动学和手部几何形状上的差异，直接将人类手部运动转移到机器人策略面临巨大挑战。现有方法要么依赖脆弱的假设（如匹配 3D 接触位置），要么需要为每个任务和物体收集对齐的人机数据，难以规模化。CHORD 试图回答：机器人如何从人类演示中学习可迁移且可规模化的任务知识？
contribution: CHORD 的核心洞察——在力旋量空间而非接触位置空间进行人机对齐——为从人类演示学习灵巧操作提供了新的范式。力旋量空间天然与执行体无关，解决了不同形态手之间的迁移难题。该方法在 4,739 个任务上的规模化验证和真实机器人部署，表明这一范式具有较强的实用价值。此外，论文展示了从单目 RGB 视频端到端重建手物交互并落地到机器人策略的完整管线（Appendix C），为"看视频学操作"提供了可行的技术路线。
abstract: Dexterous robot manipulation can benefit from the abundance of human demonstrations, but transferring such demonstrations to robot policies remains challenging. We present Contact Wrench Guidance from Human Demonstration in Robotic Dexterous Manipulation (CHORD), a framework for long-horizon manipulation of rigid and articulated objects with reinforcement learning. The key idea is object-centric contact wrench space guidance: we represent human and robot motions by the forces and torques they can induce on the object, enabling similarity to be measured by the induced instantaneous motions. This guidance makes reinforcement learning more scalable for contact-rich dexterous manipulation. We further introduce a large-scale simulation benchmark with 4,739 bimanual dexterous manipulation tasks, constructed from motion-capture datasets and reconstructed in-house videos. Evaluated on 1,831 benchmark tasks, CHORD achieves an average success rate of 82.12%, demonstrating strong scalability. CHORD also generalizes to whole-body manipulation from hand-only and third-person demonstrations, achieving a 90.77% success rate, and the learned policies transfer to the real world in both open-loop and closed-loop settings. Videos and code are available at https://nvidia-isaac.github.io/video_to_data/chord/.
selectionReason: 提出接触力旋量空间引导（CWG）的新范式，将人类演示的接触模式转移到机器人策略中，并在大规模基准（4,739 任务）和真实机器人上验证了可扩展性与 sim-to-real 能力。

title: KinDER: A Physical Reasoning Benchmark for Robot Learning and Planning
titleZh: KinDER：面向机器人学习与规划的物理推理基准
oneLiner: 提出 KinDER 基准，通过 25 个程序化生成环境系统性地评估机器人在运动学与动力学约束下的物理推理能力，覆盖五大核心挑战并对比 13 种规划与学习方法。
researchQuestion: 机器人在物理世界中交互时，必须推理自身形态、环境法则和任务要求施加的运动学（kinematic）与动力学（dynamic）约束。这些约束往往相互纠缠，使语义上简单的任务变为复杂的物理推理难题。然而，现有机器人学习和规划基准要么聚焦于通用任务多样性、长程决策或语言理解，要么面向家庭助手等应用场景，将物理推理与感知、语言理解等因素耦合。缺乏一个能独立、系统性地评估物理推理能力的基准，导致领域内对物理推理的技术现状缺乏共识。
contribution: KinDER 的核心价值在于为物理推理提供了独立且系统性的评测基准。通过将物理推理从感知、语言、领域知识中解耦，研究者可以获得清晰的信号来判断方法的物理推理能力是否真正进步。此外，KinDER 同时覆盖 2D 和 3D 环境的设计允许在不同抽象层级研究物理推理——2D 用于快速算法迭代和概念验证，3D 用于更接近真实应用的场景。统一的物体中心化状态表示和参数化技能接口，使 TAMP 与学习方法之间的直接对比成为可能，为两类方法的融合研究提供了公共测试平台。真实机器人的 real-to-sim-to-real 验证环表明这一基准并非闭门造车，而是与真实物理推理挑战具有良好的对应关系。
abstract: Robotic systems that interact with the physical world must reason about kinematic and dynamic constraints imposed by their own embodiment, their environment, and the task at hand. We introduce KinDER, a benchmark for Kinematic and Dynamic Embodied Reasoning that targets physical reasoning challenges arising in robot learning and planning. KinDER comprises 25 procedurally generated environments, a Gymnasium-compatible Python library with parameterized skills and demonstrations, and a standardized evaluation suite with 13 implemented baselines spanning task and motion planning, imitation learning, reinforcement learning, and foundation-model-based approaches. The environments are designed to isolate five core physical reasoning challenges: basic spatial relations, nonprehensile multi-object manipulation, tool use, combinatorial geometric constraints, and dynamic constraints, disentangled from perception, language understanding, and application-specific complexity. Empirical evaluation shows that existing methods struggle to solve many of the environments, indicating substantial gaps in current approaches to physical reasoning. We additionally include real-to-sim-to-real experiments on a mobile manipulator to assess the correspondence between simulation and real-world physical interaction. KinDER is fully open-sourced and intended to enable systematic comparison across diverse paradigms for advancing physical reasoning in robotics.
selectionReason: 首个系统性地隔离并评估机器人物理推理五大核心挑战（空间关系、非抓取多物体操作、工具使用、组合几何约束、动态约束）的基准，覆盖 TAMP、IL、RL、FM 四大范式共 13 个基线，填补了物理推理专项评测的空白。

title: EgoVerse: An Egocentric Human Dataset for Robot Learning from Around the World
titleZh: EgoVerse：面向机器人学习的全球大规模第一人称人类数据集
oneLiner: 由全球多家学术机构和工业伙伴联合构建的大规模第一人称人类操作数据集与协作平台，包含 1,362 小时人类演示数据，并通过跨实验室标准化实验系统研究人类数据如何有效迁移到机器人策略。
researchQuestion: 机器人学习越来越依赖大规模多样化数据，但机器人遥操作数据采集成本高昂、难以规模化。第一人称（egocentric）人类演示数据天然包含丰富的操作行为，有望成为机器人数据瓶颈的突破口。然而，现有人类数据集往往是单次性的静态发布，任务覆盖面窄，难以拓展，且分散在不同机构之间，缺乏系统的人机迁移验证。 EgoVerse 试图从根本上解决两个问题：(1) 如何建立一个可持续增长的人类数据生态系统，而不是一次性数据集；(2) 人类数据在什么条件下能有效提升机器人策略性能——回答"规模是否起作用"以及"怎样的多样性最有效"。
contribution: EgoVerse 将"人类数据驱动机器人学习"从一个研究方向提升为拥有可操作基础设施的工程实践。与 EgoMimic、EgoDex 等先前工作相比，EgoVerse 在规模（1,362 小时 vs. 数百小时）和组织形式（多机构联盟 vs. 单实验室）上有数量级提升，更重要的是提供了跨实验室、跨形态的可复现评估基准。论文的核心发现——"域对齐数据是扩展多样化人类数据的锚点"——为数据配比策略提供了明确指导。EgoVerse 还提供了从手机 APP 到工业级采集硬件的全梯度数据接入方案，降低了社区参与门槛。
abstract: Robot learning increasingly depends on large and diverse data, yet robot data collection remains expensive and difficult to scale. Egocentric human data offer a promising alternative by capturing rich manipulation behavior across everyday environments. However, existing human datasets are often limited in scope, difficult to extend, and fragmented across institutions. We introduce EgoVerse, a collaborative platform for human data-driven robot learning that unifies data collection, processing, and access under a shared framework, enabling contributions from individual researchers, academic labs, and industry partners. The current release includes 1,362 hours (80k episodes) of human demonstrations spanning 1,965 tasks, 240 scenes, and 2,087 unique demonstrators, with standardized formats, manipulation-relevant annotations, and tooling for downstream learning. Beyond the dataset, we conduct a large-scale study of human-to-robot transfer with experiments replicated across multiple labs, tasks, and robot embodiments under shared protocols. We find that policy performance generally improves with increased human data, but that effective scaling depends on alignment between human data and robot learning objectives. Together, the dataset, platform, and study establish a foundation for reproducible progress in human data-driven robot learning.
selectionReason: 迄今为止最大规模的以机器人学习为导向的第一人称人类操作数据集（1,362 小时、80k 条轨迹），由全球多所高校和工业伙伴联合贡献，并配套跨实验室、跨机器人形态的标准化人机迁移研究，是推动 human-to-robot transfer 方向可复现进展的基础设施级工作。

title: ReSteer: Quantifying and Refining the Steerability of Multitask Robot Policies
titleZh: ReSteer：量化与提升多任务机器人策略的可操控性
oneLiner: 首次系统性定义多任务机器人策略的"可操控性"，揭示当前VLA模型无法在任务执行中响应新指令的关键失败模式，并提出数据驱动框架予以改进。
researchQuestion: 当前多任务VLA模型虽然在固定指令下表现优异，但在执行过程中常常无法响应用户实时给出的新指令。例如，用户先将"关闭烤箱"的指令发送给机器人，机器人开始向烤箱移动，这时用户改口说"把碗放进水槽"，现有模型往往会忽略新指令，继续执行原任务。这种"可操控性"（steerability）的缺失严重限制了交互式机器人的实际部署。本文的核心问题是：如何量化多任务策略的可操控性？如何通过数据生成来提升可操控性？
contribution: 可操控性是多任务机器人策略走向实际部署的关键能力。ReSteer 不仅识别了当前 VLA 的根本缺陷，还提供了一套可行的数据驱动改进方案。这项工作启发我们重新思考训练数据的结构——仅仅提升单任务性能不足以构建真正可交互的机器人，任务切换能力必须被显式地注入训练过程。
abstract: Despite strong multi-task pretraining, existing policies often exhibit poor task steerability. For example, a robot may fail to respond to a new instruction "put the bowl in the sink" when moving towards the oven, executing "close the oven", even though it can complete both tasks when executed separately. We propose ReSteer, a framework to quantify and improve task steerability in multitask robot policies. We conduct an exhaustive evaluation of state-of-the-art policies, revealing a common lack of steerability. We find that steerability is associated with limited overlap among training task trajectory distributions, and introduce a proxy metric to measure this overlap from policy behavior. Building on this insight, ReSteer improves steerability via three components: (i) a steerability estimator that identifies low-steerability states without full-rollout evaluation, (ii) a steerable data generator that synthesizes motion segments from these states, and (iii) a self-refinement pipeline that improves policy steerability using the generated data. In simulation on LIBERO, ReSteer improves steerability by 11% over 18k rollouts. In real-world experiments, we show that improved steerability is critical for interactive use, enabling users to instruct robots to perform any task at any time.
selectionReason: 首次系统性地定义和量化了多任务机器人策略的"可操控性"（steerability），揭示了当前VLA模型在执行中无法响应新指令的关键失败模式，并提出包含CMI状态采样、阶段感知数据生成和自优化行为克隆的三阶段框架来提升可操控性。在LIBERO仿真和DROID真实机器人平台上均验证了有效性，真实场景下可操控性提升2.2倍。该工作对交互式机器人的实际部署具有重要指导意义。

title: Compositional Visual Planning via Inference-Time Diffusion Scaling
titleZh: 基于推理时扩散缩放的组合式视觉规划
oneLiner: 利用因子图上的 Tweedie 估计一致性约束，将短视界视频扩散模型在推理时组合为长视界规划，无需额外训练即可泛化至未见起止目标。
researchQuestion: 扩散模型在短视界机器人规划中表现优异，但将其扩展到长视界任务面临两大挑战：长视界扩散模型的计算开销过大，且长视界演示数据稀缺。现有的组合式方法（如 DiffCollage/GSC）将长序列切分为多个短片段，分别去噪后在重叠区域取平均，但这种在带噪数据空间中做因子分解的做法（Bethe 近似）会导致全局规划不一致（Section 3.1, Eq. 1-2）。本文提出并证明了 Noisy-Bethe Gap Theorem（Theorem 1, Section 4.2）：前向扩散过程破坏了因子间的独立性假设，导致 Bethe 近似在 t>0 时存在系统性偏差。
contribution: 本文触及了 Embodied AI 中的一个关键瓶颈：如何让短视界技能组合为长视界行为。与需要重新训练大模型的方法不同，本文的训练无关方案直接在推理时解决问题，具有更好的实用性和可部署性。将组合式规划建模为因子图推理，并首次从理论上分析带噪空间中因子分解失败的原因（Noisy-Bethe Gap Theorem），为未来的组合式规划方法提供了有价值的理论视角。
abstract: Diffusion models excel at short-horizon robot planning, yet scaling them to long-horizon tasks remains challenging due to computational constraints and limited training data. Existing compositional approaches stitch together short segments by separately denoising each component and averaging overlapping regions. However, this suffers from instability as the factorization assumption breaks down in noisy data space, leading to inconsistent global plans. We propose that the key to stable compositional generation lies in enforcing boundary agreement on the estimated clean data (Tweedie estimates) rather than on noisy intermediate states. Our method formulates long-horizon planning as inference over a chain-structured factor graph of overlapping video chunks, where pretrained short-horizon video diffusion models provide local priors. At inference time, we enforce boundary agreement through a novel combination of synchronous and asynchronous message passing that operates on Tweedie estimates, producing globally consistent guidance without requiring additional training. Our training-free framework demonstrates significant improvements over existing baselines, effectively generalizing to unseen start-goal combinations that were not present in the original training data. Project website: https://comp-visual-planning.github.io/
selectionReason: 提出了一种训练无关的推理时扩散缩放方法，通过因子图上的同步/异步消息传递在 Tweedie 估计层面强制边界一致性，将短视界扩散策略组合为长视界规划，在未见过的起止目标组合上展现了泛化能力。

title: LeRobot: An Open-Source Library for End-to-End Robot Learning
titleZh: LeRobot：面向端到端机器人学习的开源库
oneLiner: LeRobot 是 HuggingFace 推出的开源机器人学习库，垂直整合了从底层电机控制到大规模数据采集、多算法训练与异步推理部署的完整技术栈。
abstract: Robotics is undergoing a significant transformation powered by advances in high-level control techniques based on machine learning, giving rise to the field of robot learning. Recent progress in robot learning has been accelerated by the increasing availability of affordable teleoperation systems, large-scale openly available datasets, and scalable learning-based methods. However, development in the field of robot learning is often slowed by fragmented, closed-source tools designed to only address specific sub-components within the robotics stack. In this paper, we present lerobot, an open-source library that integrates across the entire robot learning stack, from low-level middleware communication for motor controls to large-scale dataset collection, storage and streaming. The library is designed with a strong focus on real-world robotics, supporting accessible hardware platforms while remaining extensible to new embodiments. It also supports efficient implementations for various state-of-the-art robot learning algorithms from multiple prominent paradigms, as well as a generalized asynchronous inference stack. Unlike traditional pipelines which heavily rely on hand-crafted techniques, lerobot emphasizes scalable learning approaches that improve directly with more data and compute. Designed for accessibility, scalability, and openness, lerobot lowers the barrier to entry for researchers and practitioners to robotics while providing a platform for reproducible, state-of-the-art robot learning.
selectionReason: HuggingFace 推出的端到端机器人学习开源库，垂直整合了从底层电机控制中间件到大规模数据采集存储流式传输、再到训练部署推理的完整技术栈。截至2025年9月已有16K+数据集、2.2K+贡献者，支持SO-10X、ALOHA-2、Stretch-3等8款机器人平台，以及ACT、Diffusion Policy、π₀、SmolVLA等SOTA算法实现，是推动机器人学习社区走向标准化和可复现的重要基础设施级工作。

title: EgoScale: Scaling Dexterous Manipulation with Diverse Egocentric Human Data
titleZh: EgoScale：利用大规模以自我为中心的人类数据扩展灵巧操作
oneLiner: 在大规模第一人称人类视频（20,854 小时）上预训练 VLA 模型，发现人类动作预测损失的 log-linear 扩展规律，结合少量对齐的人-机器人 mid-training 实现 22-DoF 灵巧手的长程操作与 one-shot 任务适应。
researchQuestion: 人类行为是学习物理智能最具可扩展性的数据来源之一，但如何有效利用人类数据训练灵巧操作策略仍是一个悬而未决的问题。现有工作要么使用相对较小的人类数据集（通常几十到几百小时），要么聚焦于夹爪或低自由度手，缺乏精细的手指关节控制（Sec 1, para 2）。EgoScale 试图回答一个根本性问题：大规模人类数据是否能够作为灵巧操作的主要训练信号？如果可以，是否存在可预测的扩展规律？
contribution: EgoScale 的核心理念——将人类视为一种可扩展的机器人学习具身——为灵巧操作领域提供了新的范式。其发现的 log-linear 扩展规律（人类动作预测损失随数据规模对数线性下降，且与真实机器人性能高度相关，R² = 0.9983）是首个在大规模人类数据上系统验证的人-机迁移扩展律。两阶段迁移配方（大规模预训练 + 少量对齐中训练）简单有效，且涌现出 one-shot 泛化能力，暗示人类数据中的操作结构可以被有效提取并复用于多种具身。这一方向对成本高昂的灵巧操作数据采集问题提供了可扩展的替代方案。
abstract: Human behavior is among the most scalable sources of data for learning physical intelligence, yet how to effectively leverage it for dexterous manipulation remains unclear. While prior work demonstrates human-to-robot transfer in constrained settings, it is unclear whether large-scale human data can support fine-grained, high-degree-of-freedom dexterous manipulation. We present EgoScale, a human-to-dexterous-manipulation transfer framework built on large-scale egocentric human data. We train a Vision–Language–Action (VLA) model on over 20,854 hours of action-labeled egocentric human video—more than 20× larger than prior efforts—and uncover a log-linear scaling law between human data scale and validation loss. This validation loss strongly correlates with downstream real-robot performance, establishing large-scale human data as a predictable supervision source. Beyond scale, we introduce a simple two-stage transfer recipe: large-scale human pretraining followed by lightweight aligned human–robot mid-training. This enables strong long-horizon dexterous manipulation and one-shot task adaptation with minimal robot supervision. Our final policy improves average success rate by 54% over a no-pretraining baseline using a 22-DoF dexterous robotic hand, and transfers effectively to robots with lower-DoF hands, indicating that large-scale human motion provides a reusable, embodiment-agnostic motor prior.
selectionReason: 首次在超 2 万小时第一人称人类视频上发现灵巧操作策略的 log-linear 扩展规律，提出大规模人类预训练 + 少量对齐人机 mid-training 的两阶段迁移范式，实现 22-DoF 灵巧手的长程操作和 one-shot 任务适应，并展示了跨具身迁移能力。扩展规律的发现对社区理解人-机数据关系具有重要价值。

title: π*₀.₆: A VLA that Learns from Experience
titleZh: π*₀.₆：从经验中学习的视觉-语言-动作模型
oneLiner: Physical Intelligence 在 π₀.₆ VLA 模型上引入 RECAP（RL with Experience & Corrections via Advantage-conditioned Policies）方法，通过三阶段训练——示范、纠正、在线强化学习——使通用机器人策略能从自身经验中持续改进，在真实世界任务上实现吞吐量翻倍、故障率减半。
researchQuestion: 当前机器人基础模型主要依赖人工遥操作采集的示范数据进行模仿学习。这种方法可以让机器人「有时成功」，但很难做到「每次都成功」，更难以达到人类级别的执行效率。根本原因在于：当模仿学习训练的 VLA 控制机器人与物理环境交互时，小错误会导致分布偏移，进而引发复合误差（compounding errors），最终导致任务失败。与 LLM 等产生静态输出的 AI 系统不同，机器人控制策略在闭环交互中会不断放大初始偏差。 关键问题是：如何从机器人自身的（失败的）经验中提取好的训练信号，让策略通过练习变得更强——就像人类通过实践来完善技能一样。
contribution: π*₀.₆ 标志着具身基础模型从「能跑通」到「能可靠部署」的关键转折。RECAP 方法的核心思想——将 VLA 条件化于优势值来实现可扩展的在线 RL——为解决机器人学习中的分布偏移和复合误差提供了优雅的解决方案。它指出了机器人基础模型的下一个重要演进方向：从依赖人类示范数据，转向利用机器人自身的经验作为最大规模的数据来源。正如人类通过教学、教练指导和自主练习来掌握技能，机器人也将结合多种数据源——示范定义新行为，纠正优化策略，自主经验（潜在的规模最大的数据源）完善执行，甚至可能最终达到超人类性能。
abstract: π*₀.₆ is the RL-trained version of Physical Intelligence's π₀.₆ VLA (vision-language-action) model. The work introduces RECAP (RL with Experience & Corrections via Advantage-conditioned Policies), a method that enables generalist robot policies to improve from autonomous experience. RECAP trains the robot with three stages: (1) demonstrations for initial skill acquisition, (2) coaching with human corrections to fix large mistakes, and (3) online reinforcement learning where the robot learns from its own practice. The key technical innovation is advantage-conditioned policy extraction: a value function is trained to perform credit assignment, and the VLA is conditioned on the advantage (change in value) so that it learns to prefer high-advantage actions while retaining all training data. Applied to three real-world tasks — making espresso drinks, folding diverse laundry, and assembling boxes — RECAP more than doubles throughput on the hardest tasks (espresso making) and decreases failure rates by 2× or more. The resulting π*₀.₆ model achieves practical robustness: running espresso service for an entire day, folding 50 novel laundry items in a new home without interruption, and assembling 59 boxes in a real factory.
selectionReason: 首次在VLA模型上完整实现示范→纠正→在线RL三阶段训练，通过优势条件化解决信用分配问题。在真实任务上吞吐量翻倍、故障率减半，展示了在线RL将VLA推向可靠部署的关键路径。

title: Isaac Lab: A GPU-Accelerated Simulation Framework for Multi-Modal Robot Learning
titleZh: Isaac Lab：面向多模态机器人学习的GPU加速仿真框架
oneLiner: Isaac Lab 是 Isaac Gym 的继任者，将 GPU 原生仿真范式从纯物理扩展到多模态感知、执行器建模和数据采集，提供模块化、可组合的机器人学习环境设计框架，支持强化学习与模仿学习的大规模训练与 sim-to-real 迁移。
researchQuestion: 机器人学习对仿真环境的计算效率、物理精度和感知逼真度提出了极高要求。传统的 CPU 仿真器（如 MuJoCo、PyBullet）难以满足大规模并行训练的需求，而 Isaac Gym 虽然开创了单 GPU 端到端 RL 训练的先河，但其在传感器模拟、场景构建、资产管理等方面存在局限。随着机器人学习进入多模态、大规模时代，研究者需要一个统一、可扩展的平台来整合物理仿真、逼真渲染、传感器建模和学习算法 [Section 1]。
contribution: Isaac Lab 是目前具身智能领域最重要的仿真基础设施之一。它不仅继承了 Isaac Gym 的 GPU 并行哲学，更将其从纯物理仿真拓展为涵盖渲染、传感器、执行器、数据采集和远程操作的完整平台。其 Manager-based workflow 设计尤其值得关注——它提供了类似 "MDP IDE" 的体验，使研究者能够以配置驱动的方式构建、消融和扩展环境，而不必陷入底层仿真细节。与 Newton 引擎的集成预示着可微分物理仿真的未来，这可能成为基于梯度的策略优化和系统辨识的新范式。对于任何从事机器人学习研究的团队，理解 Isaac Lab 的技术栈是进入 GPU 加速仿真世界的必修课。
abstract: We present Isaac Lab, the natural successor to Isaac Gym, which extends the paradigm of GPU-native robotics simulation into the era of large-scale multi-modal learning. Isaac Lab combines high-fidelity GPU parallel physics, photorealistic rendering, and a modular, composable architecture for designing environments and training robot policies. Beyond physics and rendering, the framework integrates actuator models, multi-frequency sensor simulation, data collection pipelines, and domain randomization tools, unifying best practices for reinforcement and imitation learning at scale within a single extensible platform. We highlight its application to a diverse set of challenges, including whole-body control, cross-embodiment mobility, contact-rich and dexterous manipulation, and the integration of human demonstrations for skill acquisition. Finally, we discuss upcoming integration with the differentiable, GPU-accelerated Newton physics engine, which promises new opportunities for scalable, data-efficient, and gradient-based approaches to robot learning.
selectionReason: Isaac Lab是Isaac Gym的正统继任者，将GPU并行仿真范式从纯物理扩展到多模态感知、执行器建模和远程操作。作为NVIDIA在具身智能仿真的旗舰框架，它集成了PhysX物理引擎与RTX光追渲染，提供manager-based和direct两种工作流，已被广泛用于四足/人形机器人locomotion、灵巧操控、工业装配、医疗手术等前沿研究。该论文是理解NVIDIA仿真技术栈和具身智能基础设施的关键文献。

title: π0.5: A VLA with Open-World Generalization
titleZh: π0.5：具备开放世界泛化能力的视觉-语言-动作模型
oneLiner: 通过在异构数据上联合训练 VLA 模型，π0.5 使移动机械臂能够在训练中从未见过的厨房和卧室中执行长序列清洁任务，分布外成功率达 94%。
researchQuestion: 当前大多数机器人系统在受控环境中运行良好，但在开放世界场景中泛化能力极弱——无论是工厂还是实验室演示，通常都需要在训练环境或极为相似的场景中进行。如何在全新、未见过的家庭环境中使机器人完成复杂的多步骤操作任务，是具身智能走向日常生活的核心挑战。这一挑战要求机器人在多个层面同时泛化：低层的物理操作技能（如如何拿起不同形状的勺子）、视觉外观泛化（识别未见过的物体实例），以及高层的语义理解（知道脏衣服应该放进洗衣篮而不是床上）。
contribution: π0.5 的核心价值在于用可复现的配方证明了 VLA 的开放世界泛化是可行的。在大多数 VLA 工作（包括 π0 自身）仅在训练环境或高度相似场景中评估的背景下，π0.5 将评估推向了"完全未见过的家庭"这一难度等级，并取得了令人印象深刻的 94% OOD 成功率。 更重要的是，消融实验清晰揭示了各类数据的作用分工：Web 数据提供语义知识（识别未见过的物体），多环境数据提供视觉多样性，跨形态数据提供物理技能基础。这种"知识解耦"的洞察对后续 VLA 训练策略的设计具有指导意义。此外，π0.5 的高层-低层双层推理架构（同一模型完成语义规划和运动控制）展示了 VLA 作为通用机器人"大脑"的潜力。
abstract: π0.5 is a vision-language-action (VLA) model that extends π0 with open-world generalization. By co-training on heterogeneous data sources — including multimodal web data, cross-embodiment robot data, multi-environment data, and mobile manipulation demonstrations — π0.5 enables a mobile manipulator to perform complex long-horizon cleaning tasks in entirely new kitchens and bedrooms never seen during training. The model uses a chain-of-thought inference procedure where the same VLA first produces high-level semantic actions in text, then outputs low-level motor commands via flow matching. In evaluations, π0.5 achieves 83% in-distribution success rate and 94% out-of-distribution success and language-following rates. Ablation studies demonstrate that all data mixture components contribute significantly, with web data being critical for OOD object recognition and multi-environment/cross-embodiment data essential for physical skill transfer. Scaling experiments show that with approximately 100 distinct training environments, π0.5 approaches the performance of a model directly trained on test environments.
selectionReason: π0.5 是 Physical Intelligence 在 π0 基础上的重要迭代，首次展示了 VLA 模型在完全未见过的家庭环境中执行长序列清洁任务的开放世界泛化能力，OOD 成功率 94%。其异构数据联合训练方案为 VLA 泛化提供了可复现的配方。

title: π0: Our First Generalist Policy
titleZh: π0：首个通用机器人策略
oneLiner: Physical Intelligence推出的通用机器人基础模型，将VLM预训练与流匹配动作生成相结合，在8种机器人平台上训练单一跨embodiment策略，实现叠衣服、收桌子、组装纸箱等高难度操控任务。此为技术报告/博客文章，非同行评审论文。
researchQuestion: 当前机器人系统是"窄领域专家"——工业机器人依赖人工编程执行重复动作，无法适应非结构化家庭环境。要让机器人像LLM一样理解指令并自主执行任务，需要大量特定机器人和特定任务的数据。π0探索通过训练单一通用机器人策略（generalist robot policy）来解决这一数据瓶颈：一个在多样化任务和多种机器人上预训练的模型，可以通过少量数据快速适应新任务，如同人类凭借一生经验快速学习新技能。
contribution: π0代表了VLA（视觉-语言-动作）基础模型方向的一个里程碑。它将LLM的通用预训练范式系统性地引入机器人领域——跨embodiment、跨任务的单一策略，展现出"预训练+微调"范式的巨大潜力。模型在叠衣服、组装纸盒等此前无机器人系统成功完成的任务上取得突破，并展现出涌现策略行为。2025年2月开源后，已催生大量后续工作（π0.5、π0.6、π0.7等），深刻影响了机器人基础模型研究方向。
abstract: π0 is a general-purpose robot foundation model that combines large-scale multi-task and multi-robot data collection with a novel network architecture to enable dexterous generalist robot control. The model uses a pre-trained vision-language model (VLM) as its backbone and augments it with continuous action outputs via flow matching, a variant of diffusion models. Trained on a diverse mixture of internet-scale VLM pre-training, the Open X-Embodiment dataset, and a proprietary dexterous manipulation dataset spanning 8 distinct robots, π0 can be either prompted for zero-shot task execution or fine-tuned for specialized downstream applications. In evaluations, π0 significantly outperforms prior robot foundation models (OpenVLA, Octo) on challenging manipulation tasks including laundry folding, table bussing, box assembly, and grocery bagging. The model weights and code were open-sourced in February 2025.
selectionReason: Physical Intelligence推出的首个通用机器人基础模型。将VLM预训练与流匹配动作生成相结合，在8种机器人平台上训练单一跨embodiment策略。此为官方博客/技术报告，非同行评审论文。

title: Aligning Cyber Space with Physical World: A Comprehensive Survey on Embodied AI
titleZh: 对齐虚拟与物理空间：具身人工智能综述
oneLiner: 在 Multi-modal Large Models (MLMs) 和 World Models (WMs) 时代，以九章结构系统梳理具身 AI 从机器人形态、仿真器到感知、交互、智能体和 sim-to-real 迁移的全景综述。论文以 "embodied world model as its brain" 为核心隐喻（Section I, Figure 2），覆盖四个核心研究目标：具身感知、具身交互、具身智能体、sim-to-real 迁移。
researchQuestion: 具身 AI（Embodied AI）是实现通用人工智能（AGI）的关键路径（Section I, p1）。尽管 MLMs 和 WMs 为具身智能体带来了强大的感知、交互和推理能力，但研究社区缺乏一篇能够系统梳理现有工作、识别核心挑战并展望未来方向的综合性综述。已有综述大多发表于 2023 年之前，未能覆盖 MLM 时代的新范式（Section I, p5）。本文旨在填补这一空白，从四个核心研究目标出发进行全面综述（Section I, p6-p7）。
contribution: 这篇综述是理解具身 AI 全局图景的最佳入口之一。与 Duan et al. (2022) 的 VR 时代综述 [6] 和 Ma et al. (2024) 的 VLA 综述 [8] 相比，本文的独特价值在于：(1) 提供了从硬件（机器人形态、仿真器）到算法（感知、交互、智能体）到迁移（sim-to-real）的端到端视角；(2) 对仿真器生态进行了最全面的横向对比（Table II/III）；(3) 对具身基础模型（SayCan→RT-2→RT-H）和任务规划（LLM→VLM→VLA）的演进路径进行了系统性梳理。arXiv 版本历经 v1 至 v8 共 8 次修订（初版 2024-07-09，最新 v8 于 2025-08-25），内容持续更新。
abstract: Embodied Artificial Intelligence (Embodied AI) is crucial for achieving Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) and serves as a foundation for various applications (e.g., intelligent mechatronics systems, smart manufacturing) that bridge cyberspace and the physical world. Recently, the emergence of Multi-modal Large Models (MLMs) and World Models (WMs) have attracted significant attention due to their remarkable perception, interaction, and reasoning capabilities, making them a promising architecture for embodied agents. In this survey, we give a comprehensive exploration of the latest advancements in Embodied AI. Our analysis firstly navigates through the forefront of representative works of embodied robots and simulators, to fully understand the research focuses and their limitations. Then, we analyze four main research targets: 1) embodied perception, 2) embodied interaction, 3) embodied agent, and 4) sim-to-real adaptation, covering state-of-the-art methods, essential paradigms, and comprehensive datasets. Additionally, we explore the complexities of MLMs in virtual and real embodied agents, highlighting their significance in facilitating interactions in digital and physical environments. Finally, we summarize the challenges and limitations of embodied AI and discuss potential future directions. We hope this survey will serve as a foundational reference for the research community. The associated project can be found at https://github.com/HCPLab-SYSU/Embodied_AI_Paper_List.
selectionReason: MLM/WM时代系统性综述具身AI的论文，以九章结构覆盖具身机器人（六类形态）、通用与真实场景仿真器（10款通用+7款真实场景）、具身感知（主动视觉感知/3D视觉定位/VLN/非视觉感知）、具身交互（EQA/抓取）、具身智能体（多模态基础模型/任务规划/动作规划）、sim-to-real迁移（具身世界模型/数据采集/具身控制）等六个核心维度，是目前该领域引用面较广的具身AI综述之一。

title: 3D Diffusion Policy: Generalizable Visuomotor Policy Learning via Simple 3D Representations
titleZh: 3D Diffusion Policy：通过简单3D表征实现可泛化的视觉运动策略学习
oneLiner: 将稀疏点云的高效编码与扩散策略的表达能力结合，仅需10个演示即可在72个仿真任务中超越2D基线24.2%，真实世界成功率85%且安全违规率为零。RSS 2024。
researchQuestion: 视觉模仿学习虽然避免了状态估计的复杂性，但通常需要大量（100-200条）人类演示才能学会鲁棒技能，数据采集耗时数天。在线学习可以缓解此问题，但引入了安全性、自动重置和额外硬件成本等挑战。因此，如何使离线模仿学习算法在极少演示下学会鲁棒和可泛化的技能，是实现实用化机器人学习的根本问题。
contribution: DP3 的核心洞察是 3D 空间理解对视觉运动控制的重要性远超预期：仅使用最简单的 MLP 点云编码器（无预训练），配合扩散策略，就能在极少演示下泛化到全新空间、外观和物体实例，且安全违规率为零。这与当前追求更大模型、更多数据的趋势形成鲜明对比——它表明在具身智能中，表征的几何结构（2D vs 3D）可能比模型容量更重要。 更重要的是，DP3 证明了 3D 表征与扩散策略之间的协同效应：同样的 3D 编码器在 BCRNN 和 IBC 上的提升远不如在扩散策略上显著，这暗示 3D 条件生成是充分利用空间信息的理想范式。该工作作为 RSS 2024 论文，为 3D 视觉模仿学习奠定了基础，后续工作如 RISE、EquiBot 等均受其启发。
abstract: Imitation learning provides an efficient way to teach robots dexterous skills; however, learning complex skills robustly and generalizablely usually consumes large amounts of human demonstrations. To tackle this challenging problem, we present 3D Diffusion Policy (DP3), a novel visual imitation learning approach that incorporates the power of 3D visual representations into diffusion policies, a class of conditional action generative models. The core design of DP3 is the utilization of a compact 3D visual representation, extracted from sparse point clouds with an efficient point encoder. In our experiments involving 72 simulation tasks, DP3 successfully handles most tasks with just 10 demonstrations and surpasses baselines with a 24.2% relative improvement. In 4 real robot tasks, DP3 demonstrates precise control with a high success rate of 85%, given only 40 demonstrations of each task, and shows excellent generalization abilities in diverse aspects, including space, viewpoint, appearance, and instance. Interestingly, in real robot experiments, DP3 rarely violates safety requirements, in contrast to baseline methods which frequently do, necessitating human intervention. Our extensive evaluation highlights the critical importance of 3D representations in real-world robot learning. Videos, code, and data are available on https://3d-diffusion-policy.github.io.
selectionReason: 将3D点云表征与扩散策略结合，在72个仿真任务和4个真实机器人任务上系统证明了3D表征对视觉模仿学习的关键作用，仅需10-40个演示即可取得85%真实世界成功率，且安全违规率为零。RSS 2024已发表，是3D扩散策略方向的开创性工作。

title: Learning Fine-Grained Bimanual Manipulation with Low-Cost Hardware
titleZh: 基于低成本硬件的精细双手操作学习
oneLiner: 用CVAE+Transformer一次性预测整段动作序列，配合$20K低成本双臂硬件ALOHA，仅需10分钟演示即可在6项精细操作任务上达到80-96%成功率。RSS 2023。
researchQuestion: 精细操作任务（如穿扎带、插电池）需要高精度力控和闭环视觉反馈，传统方案依赖昂贵硬件和精密标定。能否用低成本、不精确的硬件，通过模仿学习掌握这类技能？此前方法面临两大挑战：策略误差随时间复合（compounding error），以及人类演示数据天然多模态、非平稳。
contribution: ACT+ALOHA是近年机器人操作最具影响力的工作之一。一个简单有效的算法配合低成本开源硬件，大幅降低了精细操作研究门槛。Action Chunking + Temporal Ensemble的设计模式被后续工作广泛采用（Diffusion Policy、Mobile ALOHA等）。开源硬件和代码推动了具身智能社区的民主化。
abstract: Fine manipulation tasks, such as threading cable ties or slotting a battery, are notoriously difficult for robots because they require precision, careful coordination of contact forces, and closed-loop visual feedback. Performing these tasks typically requires high-end robots, accurate sensors, or careful calibration, which can be expensive and difficult to set up. Can learning enable low-cost and imprecise hardware to perform these fine manipulation tasks? We present a low-cost system that performs end-to-end imitation learning directly from real demonstrations, collected with a custom teleoperation interface. Imitation learning, however, presents its own challenges, particularly in high-precision domains: errors in the policy can compound over time, and human demonstrations can be non-stationary. To address these challenges, we develop a simple yet novel algorithm, Action Chunking with Transformers (ACT), which learns a generative model over action sequences. ACT allows the robot to learn 6 difficult tasks in the real world, such as opening a translucent condiment cup and slotting a battery with 80-90% success, with only 10 minutes worth of demonstrations.
selectionReason: ACT（Action Chunking with Transformers）是模仿学习领域的里程碑工作，提出了Action Chunking + Temporal Ensemble的创新范式，配合低成本的ALOHA双臂遥操作系统（总成本约$20k），仅用10分钟演示数据即可在6项精细操作任务上达到80-90%成功率。该工作开创了低成本双臂精细操作的新范式，开源硬件和代码极大地推动了具身智能社区的民主化进程，是近年来最具影响力的机器人操作论文之一。

title: Diffusion Policy: Visuomotor Policy Learning via Action Diffusion
titleZh: 扩散策略：通过动作扩散进行视觉运动策略学习
oneLiner: 将机器人视觉运动策略建模为条件去噪扩散过程，在12个任务上以46.9%的平均提升一致超越此前方法，并提出闭环动作序列预测、视觉条件化和时间序列扩散Transformer三项关键设计。
researchQuestion: 机器人行为克隆的核心挑战在于动作预测的特殊性：人类演示中存在多模态分布（同一场景下存在多种合理动作）、动作序列的时间一致性要求，以及高精度控制需求。此前方法要么使用显式策略（如高斯混合模型、离散化分类）但表达能力有限，要么使用隐式策略（如基于能量的模型）但训练不稳定。本文探索将去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）引入策略学习，以同时解决表达能力与训练稳定性问题。
contribution: 扩散策略代表了策略表示学习的一次范式转变——从直接回归动作转向学习动作分布的梯度场。该方法不仅在实验中展现出压倒性优势，更重要的是其设计原则（闭环预测、位置控制、端到端视觉编码）深刻影响了后续工作。论文提供的CNN和Transformer双骨干实现以及详尽消融分析为实践者提供了清晰的应用指南，代码开源进一步推动了该方向的快速发展。
abstract: This paper introduces Diffusion Policy, a new way of generating robot behavior by representing a robot's visuomotor policy as a conditional denoising diffusion process. We benchmark Diffusion Policy across 12 different tasks from 4 different robot manipulation benchmarks and find that it consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art robot learning methods with an average improvement of 46.9%. Diffusion Policy learns the gradient of the action-distribution score function and iteratively optimizes with respect to this gradient field during inference via a series of stochastic Langevin dynamics steps. We find that the diffusion formulation yields powerful advantages when used for robot policies, including gracefully handling multimodal action distributions, being suitable for high-dimensional action spaces, and exhibiting impressive training stability. To fully unlock the potential of diffusion models for visuomotor policy learning on physical robots, this paper presents a set of key technical contributions including the incorporation of receding horizon control, visual conditioning, and the time-series diffusion transformer. We hope this work will help motivate a new generation of policy learning techniques that are able to leverage the powerful generative modeling capabilities of diffusion models. Code, data, and training details is publicly available diffusion-policy.cs.columbia.edu
selectionReason: 首次将去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）系统性地应用于视觉运动策略学习，在12个任务、4个基准上以46.9%的平均提升一致超越此前方法。提出了闭环动作序列预测、视觉条件化和时间序列扩散Transformer三项关键设计，并提供了CNN和Transformer两种骨干网络实现。论文在仿真和真实机器人上均进行了全面验证，代码开源且已被广泛采用，是扩散策略方向的奠基性工作。

title: MimicPlay: Long-Horizon Imitation Learning by Watching Human Play
titleZh: MimicPlay：通过观看人类玩耍实现长视野模仿学习
oneLiner: 提出分层模仿学习框架，利用廉价无标签人类玩耍数据训练3D-aware latent planner，结合20-40条遥操作演示训练低层策略，在Franka Panda机器人14个长视野操作任务上超越已有方法50%以上（Table 1, Table 2）。CoRL 2023 Oral。
researchQuestion: 机器人模仿学习通常需要大量任务特定的专家演示数据，而收集此类数据的成本高昂。人类在日常生活中会产生大量自然的、无任务标签的交互行为（如随意摆弄物体），但这些数据因缺乏任务结构而难以直接用于策略学习。本文要解决的核心问题是：如何利用无标签的人类玩耍数据来提升长视野操作任务的模仿学习效果，从而减少对昂贵任务演示的依赖。
contribution: MimicPlay提出了一种务实的思路来降低机器人模仿学习的数据门槛：高层规划从廉价的人类玩耍数据中学习，低层控制从少量遥操作数据中学习。数据收集只需10分钟人类玩耍+<30分钟遥操作，而纯遥操作方法需要数小时。这种"从观看中学习"的范式与人类学习过程有相似之处，支持video prompting作为直观的机器人任务指定接口，可能启发未来更大规模地从互联网视频等非结构化数据中学习机器人技能的研究方向。
abstract: Imitation learning from human demonstrations is a promising paradigm for teaching robots manipulation skills in the real world. However, learning complex long-horizon tasks often requires an unattainable amount of demonstrations. To reduce the high data requirement, we resort to human play data — video sequences of people freely interacting with the environment using their hands. Even with different morphologies, we hypothesize that human play data contain rich and salient information about physical interactions that can readily facilitate robot policy learning. Motivated by this, we introduce a hierarchical learning framework named MimicPlay that learns latent plans from human play data to guide low-level visuomotor control trained on a small number of teleoperated demonstrations. With systematic evaluations of 14 long-horizon manipulation tasks in the real world, we show that MimicPlay outperforms state-of-the-art imitation learning methods in task success rate, generalization ability, and robustness to disturbances. Code and videos are available at https://mimic-play.github.io.
selectionReason: 提出了利用无标签人类玩耍数据来训练3D-aware latent planner的分层模仿学习框架，仅需20-40条任务演示即可在14个长视野操作任务上显著超越已有方法（Table 1, Table 2），对减少机器人学习对标注数据的依赖具有重要价值。CoRL 2023 Oral。

title: LEAGUE: Guided Skill Learning and Abstraction for Long-Horizon Manipulation
titleZh: LEAGUE：面向长序列操控的引导式技能学习与抽象
oneLiner: 将TAMP（Task and Motion Planning）的符号推理与DRL（Deep Reinforcement Learning）的技能学习有机结合，通过任务规划器引导RL智能体逐步学习可组合、可复用的操控技能，在仿真和真实机器人上验证了长序列任务求解与跨域泛化能力。
researchQuestion: 机器人要完成日常生活中的复杂任务，面临两大核心挑战：(1) 真实任务往往是长序列的（long-horizon），动作空间随任务长度指数级膨胀，DRL难以有效探索；(2) 家用机器人需要执行多样化的任务并在不同场景间泛化。TAMP方法借助符号化的状态与动作抽象，在长序列任务上表现出色且泛化能力强，但要求预先准备好完整的技能库——这不仅难以覆盖所有可能任务，而且对接触密集型（contact-rich）操作（如插入），手工设计技能极为困难（Section I）。
contribution: LEAGUE在"符号规划+学习"这一交叉方向上做出了扎实的贡献。相比于纯端到端RL方法在长序列任务上的挣扎，以及纯TAMP方法对人工设计技能的依赖，LEAGUE展示了一条中间道路：保留符号抽象的强泛化能力，同时用RL自动获取难以手工设计的技能。其"规划引导学习、学习反哺规划"的良性循环设计理念清晰优雅，技能的状态抽象机制也具备良好的理论基础（feudal learning / information hiding）。该方法为具身AI中技能学习与任务规划的结合提供了可参考的范式。
abstract: To assist with everyday human activities, robots must solve complex long-horizon tasks and generalize to new settings. Recent deep reinforcement learning (RL) methods show promise in fully autonomous learning, but they struggle to reach long-term goals in large environments. On the other hand, Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) approaches excel at solving and generalizing across long-horizon tasks, thanks to their powerful state and action abstractions. But they assume predefined skill sets, which limits their real-world applications. In this work, we combine the benefits of these two paradigms and propose an integrated task planning and skill learning framework named LEAGUE (Learning and Abstraction with Guidance). LEAGUE leverages the symbolic interface of a task planner to guide RL-based skill learning and creates abstract state space to enable skill reuse. More importantly, LEAGUE learns manipulation skills in-situ of the task planning system, continuously growing its capability and the set of tasks that it can solve. We evaluate LEAGUE on four challenging simulated task domains and show that LEAGUE outperforms baselines by large margins. We also show that the learned skills can be reused to accelerate learning in new tasks domains and transfer to a physical robot platform.
selectionReason: 该论文将TAMP的符号推理能力与DRL的技能学习能力有机结合，提出了任务规划引导技能学习的良性循环框架。技能抽象机制（information hiding）使学到的技能可组合、可复用，在长序列操控任务上显著优于HRL基线，并在真实Franka机器人上验证了sim-to-real迁移能力。

title: ProgPrompt: Generating Situated Robot Task Plans using Large Language Models
titleZh: ProgPrompt：基于大语言模型的具身机器人任务规划
oneLiner: 提出程序化 Prompt 结构，将环境状态、机器人动作能力与示例程序编码为 Python 代码格式，让 LLM 直接生成可执行的机器人任务规划，并在仿真和真实机器人上验证。
researchQuestion: 机器人任务规划需要大量领域知识：物体可供性（affordance）、动作逻辑顺序、任务相关性，以及环境状态反馈。此前利用 LLM 做任务规划的方法主要分为两类：一是让 LLM 对枚举的动作候选进行评分（如 SayCan），在动作空间大时计算开销高；二是让 LLM 自由生成文本再映射到动作（如 Language Models as Zero-Shot Planners），但生成的文本可能包含当前环境中不存在或不可执行的动作。这两种方法都缺少对环境状态的闭环感知。
contribution: ProgPrompt 是较早将 LLM 的代码理解能力与机器人任务规划结合的工作。它展示了用程序化 Prompt 约束 LLM 输出空间的有效性——不需要微调、不需要枚举动作空间，即可让 LLM 生成与当前环境兼容的可执行计划。该方法启发了后续一系列将 LLM 作为规划器的工作（如 Code as Policies、Voyager 等），是 Embodied AI 中 "LLM for planning" 方向的重要里程碑。
abstract: Task planning can require defining myriad domain knowledge about the world in which a robot needs to act. To ameliorate that effort, large language models (LLMs) can be used to score potential next actions during task planning, and even generate action sequences directly, given an instruction in natural language with no additional domain information. However, such methods either require enumerating all possible next steps for scoring, or generate free-form text that may contain actions not possible on a given robot in its current context. We present a programmatic LLM prompt structure that enables plan generation functional across situated environments, robot capabilities, and tasks. Our key insight is to prompt the LLM with program-like specifications of the available actions and objects in an environment, as well as with example programs that can be executed. We make concrete recommendations about prompt structure and generation constraints through ablation experiments, demonstrate state of the art success rates in VirtualHome household tasks, and deploy our method on a physical robot arm for tabletop tasks. Website at progprompt.github.io
selectionReason: 该论文是早期探索LLM用于机器人任务规划的代表性工作之一，提出了以程序化prompt结构（Pythonic代码格式）将环境状态和机器人能力编码给LLM的方案，并进行了真实机器人验证，对后续LLM-based planning方向有重要影响。

title: Compositional Reasoning in Robot Learning
titleZh: 机器人学习中的组合推理
oneLiner: 提出了一套从强结构化先验到弱先验的机器人组合推理技术体系，涵盖 Neural Task Programming、Neural Task Graphs 和 Regression Planning Networks，使机器人能够通过组合已知技能泛化到新的长时域操作任务。
researchQuestion: 当前机器人学习方法大多针对单一任务进行专业化训练，缺乏跨任务泛化能力。相比之下，人类能够从日常经验中提炼可复用的抽象概念，并通过组合已知的构建模块来解决新任务。本论文的核心问题是：如何赋予机器人系统组合推理能力，使其能够将已学技能灵活组合以解决新的复杂操作任务？ 论文将这一问题分为两个层次：(1) 利用强结构化先验（程序归纳、图模型）设计具有组合泛化能力的算法；(2) 放宽这些先验假设，使机器人能够从非结构化的视频演示和主动交互中自主学习组合结构。
contribution: 该博士论文为机器人学习中的组合推理问题提供了一份系统性的全景视图。从强结构化先验（神经程序归纳、图模型）到弱先验（从非结构化数据中自主学习），论文呈现了一条清晰的技术演进路线。NTP、NTG 和 RPN 等代表性工作在发表时均是该领域的里程碑式贡献，其核心思想——通过组合已知技能实现对新任务的泛化——至今仍是具身智能和 TAMP 研究的核心议题。对于希望理解组合式策略学习、分层规划和机器人操作泛化的研究者来说，这份论文是最佳的系统性入门读物之一。
abstract: To carry out diverse tasks in everyday human environments, future robots must generalize beyond the knowledge they are equipped with. However, despite recent advances in "end-to-end" deep learning, today's robot learning methods are still limited to specializing in one task at a time. At the same time, humans perform everyday tasks with ease. But instead of learning each task in silos, we distill reusable abstractions from our daily experiences and solve new tasks by composing known building blocks. Such compositional reasoning capability is crucial for developing future robots that are both competent and versatile. This two-part thesis presents a spectrum of techniques for building compositional generalization capabilities into robot learning systems. Part I starts by drawing prominent ideas from classical structured approaches in AI such as program induction and graphical models and design algorithms with strong representational priors. Neural Task Programming (NTP) represents task-subtask hierarchies using modular neural programs. NTP is designed to simultaneously exploit the representational capacity of neural networks for handling unstructured input and the compositional nature of programs for few-shot generalization. Similarly, Neural Task Graphs (NTGs) represent manipulation skills as nodes in a graph and leverage structures in skill preconditions for generalization. Regression Planning Network (RPN) further dissects the goal specification by grounding symbolic goals with object-centric representation and achieve zero-shot generalization to new task goals. To bring compositional reasoning closer to real-world settings, Part II of this thesis introduces our recent efforts to relax the strong representational prior assumptions: learning from unstructured video demonstrations and learning through trial-and-error. We first describe a framework for simultaneously learning complex visuomotor skills and discovering implicit compositional structures from human demonstrations. Experiment shows the approach allows a physical robot to perform long-horizon manipulation in a kitchen setup. Then we further relax the assumption of having demonstration data and enable a robot to learn compact planning representations by characterizing the pre- and post-condition of motion primitives through active interaction.
selectionReason: 该博士论文系统性地阐述了组合推理在机器人学习中的核心思想，从强结构化先验（NTP、NTG、RPN）到弱先验（从视频演示学习和主动交互学习），呈现了一条完整的技术演进路径。论文涵盖的 Neural Task Programming、Neural Task Graphs 和 Regression Planning Networks 均为该领域的代表性工作，对后续的组合式策略学习和 TAMP 与学习结合方向有深远影响。

title: What Matters in Learning from Offline Human Demonstrations for Robot Manipulation
titleZh: 离线人类演示的机器人操作学习：什么才是关键
oneLiner: 对六种离线学习算法进行大规模实证研究，系统分析设计选择对机器人操作学习的影响，并开源 robomimic 框架与数据集，成为该领域的重要基准。
researchQuestion: 机器人通过模仿人类演示来学习操作技能是一个有前景的方向，但领域内长期缺乏开源的人类演示数据集和可复现的学习方法，导致难以公平评估不同算法的优劣。本文试图回答一个核心问题：在使用离线人类演示数据进行机器人操作学习时，哪些设计选择真正重要？
contribution: 这篇论文在机器人操作学习领域起到了承上启下的关键作用。在它之前，社区缺乏统一的基准来公平比较不同离线学习算法；在它之后，robomimic 成为该领域事实上的标准基准框架之一。论文的核心洞察——精心设计的 BC 基线可以与离线 RL 竞争——深刻影响了后续研究的方法论选择，推动领域更多关注数据质量和系统设计，而非仅仅追求算法复杂度。该工作的 Oral 接收和超过千次的引用进一步证明了其影响力。
abstract: Imitating human demonstrations is a promising approach to endow robots with various manipulation capabilities. While recent advances have been made in imitation learning and batch (offline) reinforcement learning, a lack of open-source human datasets and reproducible learning methods make assessing the state of the field difficult. In this paper, we conduct an extensive study of six offline learning algorithms for robot manipulation on five simulated and three real-world multi-stage manipulation tasks of varying complexity, and with datasets of varying quality. Our study analyzes the most critical challenges when learning from offline human data for manipulation. Based on the study, we derive a series of lessons including the sensitivity to different algorithmic design choices, the dependence on the quality of the demonstrations, and the variability based on the stopping criteria due to the different objectives in training and evaluation. We also highlight opportunities for learning from human datasets, such as the ability to learn proficient policies on challenging, multi-stage tasks beyond the scope of current reinforcement learning methods, and the ability to easily scale to natural, real-world manipulation scenarios where only raw sensory signals are available. We have open-sourced our datasets and all algorithm implementations to facilitate future research and fair comparisons in learning from human demonstration data. Codebase, datasets, trained models, and more available at https://arise-initiative.github.io/robomimic-web/
organizations: Stanford University (Stanford Vision and Learning Lab)
The University of Texas at Austin
selectionReason: 对离线人类演示数据进行机器人模仿学习的大规模实证研究，系统分析了观测空间、策略架构、数据增强和训练超参数等设计选择的影响，并开源了robomimic框架和数据集，已成为机器人操作学习领域的重要基准工具。

title: Regression Planning Networks
titleZh: 回归规划网络
oneLiner: 将经典符号规划中的回归（后向）规划与神经网络结合，从目标状态反向生成子目标序列，实现端到端的视觉长期任务规划。发表于 NeurIPS 2019。
researchQuestion: 基于学习的方法（learning-to-plan）在直接从观测空间进行规划方面取得了进展，但受限于预测模型的精度，难以处理长周期（long-horizon）任务。另一方面，经典符号规划器在长周期任务上表现出色，但需要预定义的符号规则和符号状态，限制了其在实际场景中的应用。如何结合两者的优势——既保留符号规划的长周期推理能力，又能从高维视觉输入中端到端学习——是一个关键挑战（Sec. 1 Introduction）。
contribution: RPN 在符号规划与神经网络之间架起了桥梁。其核心洞察在于：回归（后向）规划天然适合作为神经网络的学习目标——从目标出发反向推导，模型只需学习"上一步应该是什么状态"而非"从当前状态出发的所有可能路径"。这一思路简化了规划问题的学习难度，同时保留了组合泛化的能力。在 VLA（视觉-语言-动作）和大语言模型规划日益流行的今天，RPN 的结构化规划思想仍有参考价值。
abstract: Recent learning-to-plan methods have shown promising results on planning directly from observation space. Yet, their ability to plan for long-horizon tasks is limited by the accuracy of the prediction model. On the other hand, classical symbolic planners show remarkable capabilities in solving long-horizon tasks, but they require predefined symbolic rules and symbolic states, restricting their real-world applicability. In this work, we combine the benefits of these two paradigms and propose a learning-to-plan method that can directly generate a long-term symbolic plan conditioned on high-dimensional observations. We borrow the idea of regression (backward) planning from classical planning literature and introduce Regression Planning Networks (RPN), a neural network architecture that plans backward starting at a task goal and generates a sequence of intermediate goals that reaches the current observation. We show that our model not only inherits many favorable traits from symbolic planning, e.g., the ability to solve previously unseen tasks but also can learn from visual inputs in an end-to-end manner. We evaluate the capabilities of RPN in a grid world environment and a simulated 3D kitchen environment featuring complex visual scenes and long task horizons, and show that it achieves near-optimal performance in completely new task instances.
organizations: Stanford University (Stanford Vision and Learning Lab)
selectionReason: 将经典符号规划中的回归（后向）规划思想与神经网络结合，提出了从目标状态反向生成子目标序列的回归规划网络（RPN），能够端到端地从视觉输入学习长期任务规划，在 Grid World 和 BulletPhysics 3D 仿真厨房中展现了组合泛化到新任务实例的能力（NeurIPS 2019）。

title: Neural Task Programming: Learning to Generalize Across Hierarchical Tasks
titleZh: Neural Task Programming：学习跨层次任务的泛化
oneLiner: 将 meta-learning 与神经程序归纳相结合，从单次演示中学习可复用的层次化神经程序，在任务长度、拓扑结构和语义目标三个维度上实现泛化。
researchQuestion: 机器人操作任务（如物体分拣、积木堆叠、桌面清理）通常具有层次化和组合式结构，涉及长时间的环境交互。传统方法面临两大挑战：(1) 学习能够泛化到新任务目标的策略；(2) 将动作基元层次化组合以完成长期交互。强化学习依赖任务特定的奖励函数，难以泛化；专家演示的行为克隆则只能复现单一任务。核心问题是：如何从少量演示中学习能够跨任务泛化的层次化策略？
contribution: NTP 是 2017 年将 meta-learning 思想引入机器人操作的先驱工作之一，其核心洞察——将复杂任务分解为可复用的层次化程序、通过信息隐藏实现模块化——在今天的 TAMP 与学习结合的研究中仍然具有启发性。三种泛化维度（长度、拓扑、语义）的系统性评估框架为后续工作提供了基准范式。在 Sawyer 机器人上 80-90% 的真实世界成功率证明了该方法向实际部署的可行性。对于研究组合式策略学习、分层强化学习、程序归纳的研究者来说，这是一篇必读的基础文献。
abstract: In this work, we propose a novel robot learning framework called Neural Task Programming (NTP), which bridges the idea of few-shot learning from demonstration and neural program induction. NTP takes as input a task specification (e.g., video demonstration of a task) and recursively decomposes it into finer sub-task specifications. These specifications are fed to a hierarchical neural program, where bottom-level programs are callable subroutines that interact with the environment. We validate our method in three robot manipulation tasks. NTP achieves strong generalization across sequential tasks that exhibit hierarchal and compositional structures. The experimental results show that NTP learns to generalize well towards unseen tasks with increasing lengths, variable topologies, and changing objectives.
venue: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
selectionReason: NTP 是早期将 meta-learning 和神经程序归纳引入机器人操作的代表性工作。它从单次演示中学习可复用的层次化程序，在任务长度、拓扑结构和语义目标三个维度上实现了泛化，并在真实 Sawyer 机器人上验证了 sim-to-real 迁移能力。其「信息隐藏」的作用域约束和层次化程序分解的思想对后续的 TAMP 和组合式策略学习有重要启发。
